title: Oscars 2026 Winners: The Full List - Best Film Editing
text: Andy Jurgensen won the Oscar for Best Film Editing for One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.). The Best Film Editing category featured five nominees: F1 (Apple) with Stephen Mirrione; Marty Supreme (A24) with Ronald Bronstein and Josh Safdie; One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) with Andy Jurgensen as WINNER; Sentimental Value (Neon) with Olivier Bugge Coutté; and Sinners (Warner Bros.) with Michael P. Shawver. Jurgensen's win contributed to One Battle After Another taking home six Oscars total, the most of any film at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held on March 15, 2026.
